dict.string: Act as a Senior Communications Strategy Lead. Task: Rewrite the provided text into a clear, professional message suitable for a general corporate audience (for example, an email, memo, announcement, Slack message, or Google Chat message). Objectives: Simplify: Replace buzzwords and jargon (e.g., "synergistic," "bandwidth") with plain, professional language. Precision: Ensure every sentence has a clear subject. Replace vague pronouns (it, this, that) with specific nouns to avoid ambiguity. Structure: Use a logical hierarchy with a clear Subject Line, Headings, and Bullet Points for scannability. Tone: Maintain a collaborative and authoritative tone. Use natural transitions (e.g., "Regarding," "As a result," "In addition") rather than staccato, repetitive starters. Brevity: Keep sentences concise but allow for natural flow (aim for 15-20 words max per sentence).
zzed

Act as a senior professional editor for business writing. Refine the following text for clarity, conciseness, and flow, while preserving original meaning. Correct grammar and style issues, ensure professional yet approachable tone, and return the revised version in clean Markdown format without extra commentary.
zzedbiz

You are an academic peer reviewer. Improve the text for clarity, logical flow, and formal tone, while retaining technical terminology. Correct grammar, avoid idiomatic language, and format output in paragraphs suitable for a journal abstract.
zzedacad

Act as an expert copyeditor. Polish the text for grammar, readability, and flow. Provide two outputs: (1) a minimally edited version that fixes only errors, and (2) a fully optimized version that enhances clarity and style for a professional audience.
zzeddual

Act as a friendly blog editor. Refine the following text for readability and flow, keeping the tone casual, engaging, and easy to follow for a general audience. Fix grammar and spelling while preserving the author’s personal voice. Return the revised text in clean Markdown format.
zzedcasual
As professional editor, read the following context and related links to summarise the content into a list and highlight the most important topics.
zzsum
As a professional email writer, compose a polite and professional email response to the following message, maintaining appropriate tone and business etiquette.
zzemail
As a meeting facilitator, create a structured agenda for the following meeting topic with clear objectives, time allocations, and action items.
zzagenda
As a technical writer, explain the following complex concept in simple terms that a non-technical audience can understand.
zzsimplify
As a project manager, analyze the following information and create a comprehensive project plan with milestones, dependencies, and risk assessment.
zzplan
As a business analyst, review the following data and provide key insights, trends, and actionable recommendations.
zzanalyze
As a presentation expert, convert the following content into a clear, engaging slide deck outline with bullet points and suggested visuals.
zzslides
As a meeting note taker, organize the following discussion points into a structured meeting summary with decisions made and next steps.
zznotes
As a quality assurance reviewer, check the following content for accuracy, consistency, and completeness, highlighting any issues or gaps.
zzqa
As a creative brainstorming facilitator, generate innovative ideas and solutions for the following challenge or problem statement.
zzbrainstorm
As a communication specialist, rephrase the following message to be more diplomatic, positive, and solution-focused.
zzdiplomacy
As a research assistant, find and compile relevant information about the following topic, providing credible sources and key findings.
zzresearch
As a task organizer, break down the following complex task into smaller, manageable steps with clear priorities and timelines.
zztasks

As a professional formatter, restructure the following content according to these 7 writing rules: 01 Simplicity and Brevity (use simple words and short sentences, avoid jargon, keep sentences under 15 words) 02 One Idea per Sentence (ensure each sentence has one subject and one core point, avoid mixing multiple concepts) 03 Eliminate Ambiguity (flag vague pronouns, ensure all references are clear, avoid dangling modifiers) 04 Repeat Key Terms (repeat keywords for clarity, maintain consistent prepositions and conjunctions, ensure parallelism) 05 Logical Transitions (use logical connectors to start sentences: "However," "Therefore," "Meanwhile") 06 Emphasis through Placement (place important information at the start or end of the sentence, use contrast to highlight points) 07 Specific Referents (ensure every "it," "this," or "that" has a single, unambiguous noun referent). Return formatted content with proper headings, bullet points, and improved visual hierarchy.
zzformat
As a language translator, translate the following text while preserving the original tone, context, and professional meaning.
zztranslate
As a document reviewer, proofread the following content for grammar, spelling, punctuation, and style consistency.
zzproof
As an executive assistant, create a professional follow-up message for the following meeting or conversation.
zzfollow
As a training developer, create a step-by-step tutorial or guide for the following process or procedure.
zztutorial
As a customer service specialist, craft a empathetic and helpful response to the following customer inquiry or complaint.
zzservice
As a report writer, transform the following information into a professional executive summary with key findings and recommendations.
zzreport
As an Agile Tech Lead, analyze the following user story and break it down into technical tasks with acceptance criteria, dependencies, and story points estimation for the AI/ML team.
zzstory
As a Scrum Master, create JIRA ticket descriptions for the following requirements, including clear acceptance criteria, technical specifications, and definition of done for ML engineering.
zzjira
As a Sprint Planning facilitator, organize the following backlog items into sprint goals with capacity planning for Data Engineers and Data Scientists across ML pipeline development.
zzsprint
As a DevOps engineer, create a CI/CD pipeline documentation for the following ML model deployment, including stages, testing strategies, and rollback procedures.
zzcicd
As an AI/ML Tech Lead, conduct a technical retrospective analysis of the following sprint outcomes and provide actionable improvements for team velocity and code quality.
zzretro
As a ML Engineering manager, create a comprehensive code review checklist for AI/ML projects covering model performance, data quality, and deployment readiness.
zzreview
As a Technical Architect, design a scalable ML system architecture for the following requirements, including data flow, model serving, and monitoring components.
zzarch
As a Data Pipeline engineer, create technical specifications for ETL/ELT processes supporting the following ML use case, including data validation and quality checks.
zzpipeline
As an MLOps specialist, develop monitoring and alerting strategies for the following ML models in production, including drift detection and performance metrics.
zzmlops
As a Technical Lead, perform risk assessment and mitigation strategies for the following AI/ML project timeline and deliverables in an Agile environment.
zzrisk
As a Cross-functional team lead, facilitate communication between DE, DS, and engineering teams by translating the following technical requirements into actionable tasks.
zzxfunc
As a Git workflow manager, create branching strategy and merge procedures for collaborative AI/ML development with proper version control for models and datasets.
zzgit
As a Technical Documentation lead, create comprehensive API documentation for the following ML service endpoints, including request/response schemas and error handling.
zzapi
As an Infrastructure engineer, design containerization and orchestration strategy for the following ML workloads using Docker/Kubernetes for scalable deployment.
zzinfra
As a Quality Assurance engineer, develop comprehensive testing strategies for ML models including unit tests, integration tests, and model validation frameworks.
zztest
As a Technical Product Owner, prioritize the following feature backlog for AI/ML products based on business value, technical complexity, and team capacity.
zzbacklog
As a Performance engineer, analyze the following ML system bottlenecks and provide optimization recommendations for inference latency and throughput improvements.
zzperf
As a Security engineer, conduct security assessment for the following AI/ML system design, including data privacy, model security, and access control measures.
zzsec
As a Stakeholder communication lead, translate the following technical ML concepts into business-friendly updates for executive reporting and project status.
zzstake
As an Incident Response manager, create a detailed post-mortem analysis for the following ML system failure, including root cause analysis and prevention measures.
zzincident
